title: Towards Autonomous Micromobility through Scalable Urban Simulation
title_zh: 迈向自主微出行：通过可扩展的城市仿真
abstract: Micromobility, which utilizes lightweight mobile machines moving in urban public spaces - such as delivery robots and electric wheelchairs - emerges as a promising alternative to vehicular mobility. Current micromobility depends mostly on human manual operation (in-person or remote control), which raises safety and efficiency concerns when navigating busy urban environments full of unpredictable obstacles and pedestrians. Assisting humans with AI agents in maneuvering micromobility devices presents a viable solution for enhancing safety and efficiency. In this work, we present a scalable urban simulation solution to advance autonomous micromobility. First, we build URBAN-SIM – a high-performance robot learning platform for large-scale training of embodied agents in interactive urban scenes. URBAN-SIM contains three critical modules: Hierarchical Urban Generation pipeline, Interactive Dynamics Generation strategy, and Asynchronous Scene Sampling scheme, to improve the diversity, realism, and efficiency of robot learning in simulation. Then, we propose URBAN-BENCH – a suite of essential tasks and benchmarks to gauge various capabilities of the AI agents in achieving autonomous micromobility. URBAN-BENCH includes eight tasks based on three core skills of the agents: Urban Locomotion, Urban Navigation, and Urban Traverse. We evaluate four robots with heterogeneous embodiments, such as the wheeled and legged robots, across these tasks. Experiments on diverse terrains and urban structures reveal each robot’s strengths and limitations. Project page: https://metadriverse.github.io/urban-sim/.
abstract_zh: 微出行利用在城市公共空间中移动的轻型移动机器（如送货机器人和电动轮椅），成为车辆出行的一种有前景的替代方案。当前的微出行主要依赖人工手动操作（现场或远程控制），这在充满不可预测障碍物和行人的繁忙城市环境中引发了安全和效率问题。用AI代理辅助人类操控微出行设备，是提升安全性和效率的可行方案。本文提出了一种可扩展的城市仿真解决方案，以推进自主微出行。首先，我们构建了URBAN-SIM——一个高性能的机器人学习平台，用于在交互式城市场景中大规模训练具身代理。URBAN-SIM包含三个关键模块：层次化城市生成管线、交互式动力学生成策略和异步场景采样方案，以提高仿真中机器人学习的多样性、真实性和效率。然后，我们提出了URBAN-BENCH——一套基本任务和基准，用于衡量AI代理在实现自主微出行方面的各种能力。URBAN-BENCH包括基于代理三种核心技能的八个任务：城市移动、城市导航和城市穿越。我们评估了四种异构形态的机器人（如轮式和腿式机器人）在这些任务上的表现。在不同地形和城市结构上的实验揭示了每种机器人的优势和局限性。项目页面：https://metadriverse.github.io/urban-sim/。
tldr_zh: 提出可扩展城市仿真平台URBAN-SIM和基准URBAN-BENCH，用于训练和评估自主微出行AI代理。
cover_zh: 城市机器人不再迷路｜新仿真平台让AI学会在复杂街道自主穿行
